title: Melted Crispy Uruguayan Beef Pie
description: A buttery, shattering, cozy Uruguayan dish featuring filo pastry and tender beef that melts in your mouth.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat, then sauté the diced onion and minced garlic until translucent.
Add the cubed beef and cook until browned, then stir in the diced bell pepper, crushed tomatoes, cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper.
Pour in the beef broth, bring to a simmer, and cook for 10 minutes until the mixture thickens, then remove from heat.
Lay a sheet of filo pastry on a clean surface, brush with melted butter, and fold in half; repeat with the remaining sheets to form a layered crust.
Spread the beef mixture into the bottom of a greased baking dish, cover with the layered filo sheets, and seal the edges.
Brush the top of the pastry with additional melted butter and bake for 20 minutes until golden and crispy.
Let the pie cool for 5 minutes before slicing and serving warm.
